title: Foundational Concepts of Deep Learning
description: A flowchart showing the hierarchical relationship between Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Reinforcement Learning, highlighting their core purposes.
relationships: AI is the broadest field, which encompasses ML
ML is a subset of AI focused on learning from data
DL is a specialized subset of ML using multi-layered neural networks
RL is a paradigm of ML where an agent learns by interacting with an environment
Neural Networks are the fundamental architecture that enables DL
